ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "size_group" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., men's, women's) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category in the categories table */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the size (e.g., adult, child) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the size (e.g., spring, summer, fall, winter) */,
  "product_line" TEXT /* Product line of the size (e.g., casual, formal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the size standard */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size from sizes table */,
  "measurement" REAL /* Measurement associated with the size in centimeters */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, in) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the size (e.g., adult, child) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the size (e.g., spring, summer, fall, winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standards_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the products table */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size in sizes table */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Amount of stock available for the size */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the inventory is held */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the inventory was updated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category in the categories table */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the inventory (e.g., spring, summer, fall, winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category in the categories table */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing (e.g., shirt, pants) */,
  "product_line" TEXT /* Product line of the clothing (e.g., casual, formal) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing product */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the product (e.g., spring, summer, fall, winter) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the product (e.g., adult, child) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion entry */,
  "from_country" TEXT /* Country code for the original size */,
  "to_country" TEXT /* Country code for the target size */,
  "from_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size in the original country */,
  "to_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size in the target country */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the size (e.g., adult, child) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the size (e.g., spring, summer, fall, winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_to_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_from_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the feedback is about */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the fit (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the user */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the user (e.g., adult, child) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the feedback (e.g., spring, summer, fall, winter) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, staff) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the user (e.g., adult, child) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the products table */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size in sizes table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., men's, women's, children's) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
